projectDescription: Hermes Agent is an iOS app that lets you create tasks in plain language and hand them to a personal AI agent that executes them in real time — sending emails, managing calendars, searching the web, and more.
keyFeatures: Natural language task creation — type or speak tasks; the AI rewrites and executes them automatically
Real-time agent activity — watch the agent's thinking and tool calls stream live in the app
Approval and interaction flows — the agent pauses and asks before sending emails, creating events, or taking irreversible actions
Scheduled automations (cron jobs) — create recurring tasks that run on a schedule
Agent memory — the agent learns preferences and facts across runs; view and manage memories in the Passbook
Third-party integrations — connect Gmail, Google Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets, GitHub, Slack, Notion, Linear, and more via OAuth
Multiple AI models — choose from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, DeepSeek, Qwen, and others via OpenRouter
Live Activity & Dynamic Island — task progress visible on the Lock Screen and in the Dynamic Island
Push notifications — get notified when a task finishes or needs your input
BYO Hermes connector — use Doit as an iOS front-end over your own self-hosted Hermes gateway
publicApiSurface: iOS app: Sign in with Apple authentication
iOS app: Invite code redemption and agent provisioning
iOS app: Task creation (text, voice, photo)
iOS app: Task list with Todo / Scheduled / Done (Passbook) tabs
iOS app: Task detail with live activity feed and artifact cards
iOS app: Interaction/approval cards (Send / Rewrite / Cancel)
iOS app: Scheduled task (cron job) creation and management
iOS app: Settings > Model — AI model selection
iOS app: Settings > Connections — OAuth integration management
iOS app: Settings > Memory — view, add, edit, pin, and delete agent memories
Runner environment config: SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, HERMES_MODEL_DEFAULT, MAX_CONCURRENT_RUNS, COMPOSIO_API_KEY, APNS_KEY_PATH, BYO_CONNECTOR_MODE
iOS xcconfig: DOIT_SUPABASE_URL, DOIT_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, DOIT_BUNDLE_ID, DOIT_DEVELOPMENT_TEAM
